Apple and pear trees in the old Slade orchard. Not maintained well so fruit often is small because of rust. Still worth it.
243 N Prospect St, Burlington, VT 05401, USA
Grape vine on the fence of St. Joseph's Home. Be careful harvesting - trucks go by quite fast here. Makes good jam. Access: Private but overhanging. Falling Fruit season: September-October.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
Large patch of wild raspberries and blackberries at Oakledge park Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: June-August.
In Redstone Quarry Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: July-September.
